message: 🌱 Add open-policy-agent-opa-: Publish arm64 binaries and container images mission (#574)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "open-policy-agent-opa-2233-publish-arm64-binaries-and-container-images",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "open-policy-agent-opa-: Publish arm64 binaries and container images",
+    "description": "Publish arm64 binaries and container images. Requested by 17+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current open-policy-agent-opa- deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your open-policy-agent-opa- version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nhelm list -n open-policy-agent-opa- 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working open-policy-agent-opa- installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review open-policy-agent-opa- configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant open-policy-agent-opa- configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nkubectl get configmap -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-policy-agent-opa-\n```\n# Expected Behavior\n\nIt would be great if it was possible to run open-policy-agent on arm64 architecture, via multi arch container images (https://docs.docker.com/engine/reference/commandline/manifest/#create-and-push-a-manifest-list) \n\nMuliarch"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Publish arm64 binaries and container images",
+        "description": "Changed the build process to build amd64 and arm/v6 architectures.\n\nFixes: open-policy-agent/kube-mgmt#69\n\nThe build process uses dockers buildx functionality to build multi architecture images.\n\nThe process builds the code for amd64 and arm.\n\nDocker images are built for amd64 and arm/v6.\n\nDocker\n```yaml\n$ make build GOARCH=arm64 GOOS=linux\nmake: '_obj/opa.wasm' is up to date.\ncp wasm/_obj/opa.wasm internal/compiler/wasm/opa/opa.wasm\nGO111MODULE=on GOFLAGS=-mod=vendor go generate\nGO111MODULE=on GOFLAGS=-mod=vendor go build -o opa_linux_arm64 -ldflags \"-X github.com/open-policy-agent/opa/version.Version=0.19.0-dev -X github.com/open-policy-agent/opa/version.Vcs=88d6ca32 -X github.com/open-policy-agent/opa/version.Timestamp=2020-03-29T02:25:25Z -X github.com/open-policy-agent/opa/version.Hostname=Patricks-MacBook-Pro.local\"\n$ file opa_linux_arm64\nopa_linux_arm64: ELF 64-bit LSB executable, ARM a\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n open-policy-agent-opa- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-policy-agent-opa-\nkubectl get events -n open-policy-agent-opa- --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Publish arm64 binaries and container images\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Changed the build process to build amd64 and arm/v6 architectures.\n\nFixes: open-policy-agent/kube-mgmt#69\n\nThe build process uses dockers buildx functionality to build multi architecture images.\n\nThe process builds the code for amd64 and arm.\n\nDocker images are built for amd64 and arm/v6.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ make build GOARCH=arm64 GOOS=linux\nmake: '_obj/opa.wasm' is up to date.\ncp wasm/_obj/opa.wasm internal/compiler/wasm/opa/opa.wasm\nGO111MODULE=on GOFLAGS=-mod=vendor go generate\nGO111MODULE=on GOFLAGS=-mod=vendor go build -o opa_linux_arm64 -ldflags \"-X github.com/open-policy-agent/opa/version.Version=0.19.0-dev -X github.com/open-policy-agent/opa/version.Vcs=88d6ca32 -X github.com/open-policy-agent/opa/version.Timestamp=2020-03-29T02:25:25Z -X github.com/open-policy-agent/opa/version.Hostname=Patricks-MacBook-Pro.local\"\n$ file opa_linux_arm64\nopa_linux_arm64: ELF 64-bit LSB executable, ARM aarch64, version 1 (SYSV), statically linked, Go BuildID=j_yyDbC8Pu-fQJ7oq9VH/6aqO2bg5NvfQoXMp8jgo/8bT9gva510YbDWZxDm3j/q9AxXn6FTP1ORmwqT4AC, not stripped"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "open-policy-agent-opa-",
+      "graduated",
+      "security",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "open-policy-agent-opa-"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",

+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/open-policy-agent/opa/issues/2233",

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with open-policy-agent-opa- installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
